heading: Prerequisites
body:
Datadog integration is available only on `M10+` clusters.

To integrate Atlas with Datadog, you must have a Datadog account
and a Datadog API (Application Programming Interface) key. Datadog grants you an API (Application Programming Interface) key when you first
create a Datadog account.

If you do not have an existing Datadog account, you can sign up at
[https://app.datadoghq.com/signup](https://app.datadoghq.com/signup).
